intro: Curtains of green and violet light ripple across the night sky above the snowy pines. A rare aurora, and a feeling of quiet fortune settles over your team beneath it.
title: The Aurora
description: A rare aurora shimmers overhead. Stand beneath the lights to bathe your team in a fleeting blessing - a guaranteed high-tier reward. Or walk on and let the lights fade.
query: Will you stand under the aurora?

1.label: Stand under the lights
1.selected: You stand still beneath the shifting colours, and the lights seem to answer...

2.label: Walk on
2.selected: You watch the aurora a moment longer, then press on through the snow.
